case_title: DOUGLAS AVERY VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AVERY, DOUGLAS AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DOES 1 TO 50 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-01-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-29-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUL-17-2003
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JUL-01-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE SERVICE OF SUMMONS & COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AVERY, DOUGLAS
BEFORE HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-15-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE AUG-01-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-15-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
